name: npcink/npcink-toolbox
description: WordPress AI toolbox plugin for Cloud-managed web search, Cloud-managed image-source candidates, Qdrant vector search, and fixed-flow operator actions.

scripts.package:release: rm -rf build/npcink-toolbox build/npcink-toolbox.zip && mkdir -p build && rsync -a --delete --exclude-from=.distignore ./ build/npcink-toolbox/ && cd build && zip -qr npcink-toolbox.zip npcink-toolbox
scripts.plugin-check:release: WP_PATH="${WP_PATH:-/Users/muze/Local Sites/magick-ai/app/public}"; WP_CLI_BIN="${WP_CLI_BIN:-/tmp/wp-cli.phar}"; WP_CLI_PHP="${WP_CLI_PHP:-$HOME/Library/Application Support/Local/lightning-services/php-8.5.3+1/bin/darwin-arm64/bin/php}"; SOCKET="${WP_DB_SOCKET:-$HOME/Library/Application Support/Local/run/NPb24Zg9g/mysql/mysqld.sock}"; "$WP_CLI_PHP" -d display_errors=0 -d error_reporting=8191 -d mysqli.default_socket="$SOCKET" "$WP_CLI_BIN" --path="$WP_PATH" --no-color plugin check npcink-toolbox --format=table --exclude-directories=tests,.git,vendor,node_modules,build,docs,scripts --exclude-files=.gitignore,.distignore,AGENTS.md,README.md,composer.json,composer.lock,phpcs.xml,phpcs.xml.dist,phpstan.neon,phpstan.neon.dist
scripts.smoke:article-core: WP_PATH="${WP_PATH:-/Users/muze/Local Sites/magick-ai/app/public}"; WP_CLI_BIN="${WP_CLI_BIN:-/tmp/wp-cli.phar}"; WP_CLI_PHP="${WP_CLI_PHP:-$HOME/Library/Application Support/Local/lightning-services/php-8.5.3+1/bin/darwin-arm64/bin/php}"; SOCKET="${WP_DB_SOCKET:-$HOME/Library/Application Support/Local/run/NPb24Zg9g/mysql/mysqld.sock}"; NPCINK_TOOLBOX_ARTICLE_CORE_SMOKE_PURGE="${NPCINK_TOOLBOX_ARTICLE_CORE_SMOKE_PURGE:-1}"; export NPCINK_TOOLBOX_ARTICLE_CORE_SMOKE_PURGE; "$WP_CLI_PHP" -d display_errors=0 -d error_reporting=8191 -d mysqli.default_socket="$SOCKET" "$WP_CLI_BIN" --path="$WP_PATH" --no-color eval-file tests/smoke-article-draft-core-proof.php
scripts.smoke:metadata-delta: WP_PATH="${WP_PATH:-/Users/muze/Local Sites/magick-ai/app/public}"; WP_CLI_BIN="${WP_CLI_BIN:-/tmp/wp-cli.phar}"; WP_CLI_PHP="${WP_CLI_PHP:-$HOME/Library/Application Support/Local/lightning-services/php-8.5.3+1/bin/darwin-arm64/bin/php}"; SOCKET="${WP_DB_SOCKET:-$HOME/Library/Application Support/Local/run/NPb24Zg9g/mysql/mysqld.sock}"; "$WP_CLI_PHP" -d display_errors=0 -d error_reporting=8191 -d mysqli.default_socket="$SOCKET" "$WP_CLI_BIN" --path="$WP_PATH" --no-color eval-file tests/smoke-content-metadata-delta.php
